meta.title: AyurTime Smart Alerts & Reminder Settings
meta.description: Default Ayurvedic daily routine alert configuration

default_alerts.name: Brahma Muhurta Wake-up
default_alerts.message: Rise and shine! Brahma Muhurta - best time for meditation and prana.
default_alerts.ayurveda_tip: Sip warm water. Do not check phone. Meditate for 10 minutes.

default_alerts.name: Morning Warm Water
default_alerts.message: Drink 1-2 glasses of warm water to cleanse bowels and activate agni.
default_alerts.ayurveda_tip: Add lemon or ginger to warm water for agni activation.

default_alerts.name: Abhyanga Reminder
default_alerts.message: Self-massage time - 10 mins of abhyanga before bath.
default_alerts.ayurveda_tip: Use sesame oil (Vata), coconut oil (Pitta), or mustard oil (Kapha).

default_alerts.name: Breakfast Time
default_alerts.message: Time for sattvic breakfast. Eat warm, light, and nourishing food.
default_alerts.ayurveda_tip: Avoid heavy foods at breakfast. Upma, poha, fruit, or warm milk are ideal.

default_alerts.name: Main Meal - Noon
default_alerts.message: Noon meal time - your agni is strongest now. Eat your largest meal.
default_alerts.ayurveda_tip: Eat in silence. Chew 32 times. No cold drinks with meals.

default_alerts.name: Post-Lunch Walk
default_alerts.message: Take a short 10-minute walk after lunch to aid digestion.
default_alerts.ayurveda_tip: Vajrasana (sitting on heels) for 5 min after meals also aids digestion.

default_alerts.name: Evening Snack
default_alerts.message: Light evening snack time - fruits or herbal tea.
default_alerts.ayurveda_tip: Avoid heavy snacks. Tulsi tea or fruit is ideal at this hour.

default_alerts.name: Evening Meditation
default_alerts.message: Evening meditation/prayer time. Sandyavandana or silent meditation.
default_alerts.ayurveda_tip: Light a ghee lamp or incense. Chant Om or Gayatri Mantra 108 times.

default_alerts.name: Light Dinner
default_alerts.message: Light dinner time. Eat by 7-8 PM for good digestion and sleep.
default_alerts.ayurveda_tip: Avoid heavy protein and dairy at night. Khichdi or soup is ideal.

default_alerts.name: Triphala Bedtime
default_alerts.message: Take Triphala in warm water before bed for gentle overnight cleanse.
default_alerts.ayurveda_tip: 1 tsp Triphala + 1 cup warm water. Swish around mouth then drink.

default_alerts.name: Sleep Time
default_alerts.message: Lights out. Sleep before 10 PM for optimal dosha balance.
default_alerts.ayurveda_tip: Apply sesame oil to feet. No screens. Sleep on left side for better digestion.

default_alerts.name: Vrat Day Alert
default_alerts.message: Today is a Vrat day. Prepare your sattvic fasting items.
default_alerts.ayurveda_tip: Allowed: fruits, milk, sabudana, sendha namak, dry fruits. No grains.
